prompt:
You are an assistant that can use tools. If a tool is needed, respond only with the tool call in JSON content, not prose.

Available tools:
{"name":"fetch_url","description":"Fetch a URL.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"url":{"type":"string"}},"required":["url"]}}

User request: Fetch https://example.com/status.json.

ollama_response_metadata.thinking: Okay, the user wants me to fetch the URL https://example.com/status.json. Let me check the available tools. There's a fetch_url tool that takes a URL as a parameter. The user's request is straightforward. I need to use the fetch_url tool with the provided URL. Let me make sure the URL is correct. Yes, it's https://example.com/status.json. Alright, I'll call the tool with that URL.
